user.title: Alexa Smart Home — Connection Settings
user.description: Configure your Amazon Alexa region and language.

data_description.amazon_domain: The Amazon domain where your devices are registered (e.g. amazon.com, amazon.co.uk).
data_description.language: The language/locale code for your Alexa account.
data_description.cache_ttl: How long to cache device states before re-fetching (30–3600 seconds).

cookie.title: Alexa Smart Home — Session Cookie
cookie.description:
To authenticate, you need to provide your Amazon session cookie.

**How to get it:**
1. Open **https://www.{amazon_domain}** in a browser and log in.
2. Open Developer Tools (F12) → **Application** tab → **Cookies** → select `{amazon_domain}`.
3. Click **Copy all as header value** (or manually copy all cookie key=value pairs separated by `;`).
4. Paste the result below.

The cookie is stored locally and only sent to Amazon's Alexa API.

data_description.cookie: The full Cookie header value from your browser (all key=value pairs separated by semicolons).

error.cookie_required: Please paste your Amazon session cookie.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Alexa API. Check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: The cookie is invalid or expired. Please copy a fresh cookie from your browser.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Alexa account is already configured.
